product.name: ScrubWiz 10-in-1 Steam Cleaner, Steam Mop & Detachable Handheld Steam Cleaner, 320ml Water Tank, 10s Fast Heating, Portable Steamer for Kitchen, Floor, Tiles, Window, BBQ Grill, Car, Bright White
features: FAST HEATING & LONG-LASTING CLEANING: The steam cleaner for home takes only 10S to generate 248°F high-temperature steam, effectively removing stubborn stains. Equipped with a 320ml (11oz) removable water tank, You don't need to add water frequently. The separate heater and water tank let you refill anytime without waiting for cooling

ADJUSTABLE-LENGTH HANDHELD STEAM CLEANER: The all-in-one design replaces multiple cleaning tools and frees up valuable storage space. The steam cleaner comes with three detachable extension poles and two washable microfiber pads, allowing you to easily convert it into a steam mop that is suitable for cleaning sealed hardwood floors and tiles

MULTI-FUNCTION HANDHELD STEAMER WITH 10 ACCESSORIES: Are you tired of tedious cleaning? Let the portable steam cleaner mop with 10 practical accessories become your powerful cleaning assistant! The handheld steamer can tackle kitchen grease, limescale, barbecue grill, window dust, and clothing wrinkles. It also can clean sofas, carpets, and car interiors. It's the perfect Christmas gift, ideal for a variety of cleaning needs around the house

SAFETY LOCK DESIGN & HANDS-FREE: The floor steam cleaner featured a safety lock. When the device is plugged in, push the safety lock to the locked position to prevent accidental steam activation, providing greater peace of mind. For hands-free steaming during cleaning, simply press the steam switch and engage the safety lock! No need for continuous button pressing, making you clean large area or remove deep stain easier and more efficient

CHEMICAL-FREE & IDEAL FOR HOME CLEANING: Our steam mop cleaner heats water into high-temperature steam, delivering a deep clean without adding chemical detergents. Safe for your family and beloved pets, it allows children and furry friends to play freely in a clean and comfortable home

PRACTICAL KIT & WARM SERVICE: Our complete kit includes handheld steam cleaner host*1, mop extension pole*3, mop head*1, carpet glider*1, washable microfiber pad*2, window cleaner cloth*1, garment cloth*1, scouring pad brush*1, scraper tool*1, nylon brush*1, metal brush*1, bent nozzle*1,long nozzle*1 window cleaner with squeegee*1 and bag storage*1. If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us
